visual_description: A man wearing glasses and an orange shirt reclines on a white couch, holding a cigar, while a woman in a patterned dress leans against him with her hand on his chest. The scene shifts to a dark, nighttime view illuminated by a single light source, revealing only a patch of grass and the faint outline of a vehicle’s dashboard.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and moderate loudness, speaking at a moderate pace. There are no noticeable non-speech sounds or cues.
